title: EndGrief
description: A mod to make building in main end island more feasible.
body:
There are 3 gamerules included in the mod
- **disableDragonGrief** - [true/false] - disables the dragon breaks blocking
- **endPillarsGriefType** - [REPLACE_AIR / REPLACE_NOTHING / VANILA] - determines what blocks will be removed/replaced in the end pillar generation/regen
- **endCrystalExplosion** - [NONE / DESTROY / BREAK] - determines what kind of damage the **INITIAL SPAWNING EXPLOSION** of end crystals cause. NONE will only cause damage to entities, BREAK will drop all the blocks, while with DESTROY only some of the blocks will be dropped as items.

End Pillar generation features will only affect regeneration of them when spawning the dragon after killing it initially. It will not affect initial end generation
